item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-14 - Today's Summary
item.description: AI Agent Frameworks remain the dominant category by average daily star velocity (1292), with sustained high activity across multiple repos. In contrast, Local LLM/Inference shows only moderate activity, with LMCache as the sole standout. A notable acceleration anomaly is stas00/ml-engineering, which jumped 3.8x in weekly delta despite low daily numbers, suggesting a sudden spike in developer curiosity about ML training methodologies. The absence of any cross-source signals (no Product Hunt launches or HN front-page overlap) indicates that today's attention is primarily GitHub-native, not amplified by launch events. The quietness of previously hot categories like Coding Agents and MCP/Tool Calling, which have moderate but not explosive velocity, may indicate a consolidation phase after recent hype. Top projects: LMCache/LMCache, microsoft/PowerToys, iptv-org/iptv, stas00/ml-engineering, gvergnaud/ts-pattern, addyosmani/agent-skills, Panniantong/Agent-Reach, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, nexu-io/open-design, sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills, getagentseal/codeburn, kenn-io/agentsview Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

item.title: [sustained_hot] LMCache/LMCache (+335 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: LMCache is a vendor-neutral KV cache management layer that turns LLM inference KV caches into persistent, reusable, and observable assets, reducing TTFT and improving throughput for long-context and multi-turn workloads. Why it matters: With 8,895 stars and a 24-hour delta of +335, LMCache is experiencing strong sustained growth. The acceleration ratio is low (1.0), indicating steady organic interest rather than a sudden spike. Recent releases (e.g., multiprocess architecture in April 2026, agentic workload benchmarks on AMD MI300X in May 2026) and integrations with NVIDIA Dynamo, Redis, and CoreWeave keep the project in the spotlight. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward treating KV caches as persistent, reusable infrastructure rather than ephemeral state. For AI developers, adopting LMCache can unlock significant performance gains without changing models, and its vendor neutrality reduces lock-in risk. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] microsoft/PowerToys (+466 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of over 30 free utilities that supercharge Windows productivity and customization. Why it matters: With 134,647 stars, 436 stars in the last 24 hours, and a sustained_hot trend, PowerToys continues to see strong daily interest. The low acceleration (1) indicates steady, organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This consistent attention reflects its status as a must-have tool for Windows power users. Developer insight: For AI developers, PowerToys shows that practical, non-AI productivity tools still command massive attention. However, its inclusion in 'Other AI' category suggests potential for AI integration (e.g., smart paste, OCR). The project's scale and community offer a platform for AI-powered features. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] iptv-org/iptv (+1281 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A massive, community-curated collection of publicly available IPTV channel playlists from around the world. Why it matters: With 119k stars and a 24-hour delta of +1,281 stars, this project shows sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic interest rather than a sudden spike. It remains one of the most-starred repositories on GitHub, consistently attracting thousands of new stars daily. Developer insight: For AI developers, this repo signals the value of curated, structured datasets. The underlying database could be used to train models for channel classification, content recommendation, or stream quality prediction. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+20 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: A comprehensive open book of methodologies, tools, and commands for training and fine-tuning large language and multi-modal models. Why it matters: With 18,015 stars and a sudden acceleration ratio of 2.9 (high), the repo is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour star delta of 20 and 7-day average of 6 indicate a sharp increase in attention, likely driven by the growing need for hands-on ML engineering guidance as LLM training becomes more accessible. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward open, community-driven knowledge sharing in ML engineering, reducing the barrier for smaller teams to adopt large-scale training practices. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] gvergnaud/ts-pattern (+3 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: TS-Pattern brings exhaustive, type-safe pattern matching to TypeScript, enabling concise and readable branching on complex data structures with smart type inference. Why it matters: The repo shows a sudden breakout with an acceleration of 3 (high), gaining 4 stars in the last 24 hours and maintaining a 7-day average of 1.5 stars/day. With 15,022 total stars and only 166 forks, the star-to-fork ratio is extremely high, indicating broad interest. The recent commit within 7 days and the sudden acceleration suggest renewed attention, possibly from a viral post or community highlight. Developer insight: This signals a growing demand for functional programming patterns in TypeScript, especially for frontend state management. AI developers building type-safe agents or data pipelines can leverage TS-Pattern for robust branching logic. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] addyosmani/agent-skills (+3203 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A production-grade pack of 24 structured skills and slash commands that encode senior engineering workflows for AI coding agents. Why it matters: The repo has exploded from 0 to 51,894 stars with a 24h delta of 2,051 and a 7d delta of 3,844. The acceleration ratio is 4 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is not gradual growth — it's a viral spike driven by the release of a comprehensive, well-documented skill pack for multiple agent platforms. Developer insight: The project signals a shift from ad-hoc agent prompting to structured, skill-based agent programming. It suggests that the future of AI-assisted development lies in reusable, verifiable skill packs rather than raw LLM prompts. Developers should consider adopting or contributing to such skill ecosystems. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1024 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI coding agents zero-friction access to read and search across Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — without any API fees. Why it matters: With 26,660 stars and a 7-day average of 800 new stars per day, Agent Reach is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The 24-hour delta of 597 and acceleration of 0.7 indicate a steady, organic surge — not a one-day spike. This momentum suggests broad, ongoing adoption among AI developers who need their agents to interact with the open web. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' as a new category: tools that abstract away platform-specific barriers (API costs, login requirements, anti-bot measures) so agents can operate freely. The sustained star growth indicates strong product-market fit and a clear demand for open-source, community-maintained alternatives to paid data APIs. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+454 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for performance and prefix-cache stability. Why it matters: With 21,783 stars, a 24-hour delta of 454, and a 7-day delta of 2,930, this project shows sustained high velocity (7-day avg delta 637.6). The acceleration of 0.7 indicates steady growth without sudden spikes, making it a reliable hot project in the AI coding agent space. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward specialized, model-native coding agents that optimize for API costs and session persistence, rather than generic LLM wrappers. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+762 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design that turns your laptop into an agent-native design studio with 150+ design systems, 260+ plugins, and MCP integration for 21 coding agents. Why it matters: With 64,374 stars, a 24h delta of +762, and a 7-day average of +928.6 stars/day, this project is sustaining explosive growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 indicates steady, high-velocity momentum rather than a sudden spike. The recent v0.10.0 release (all-in-one agentic workspace) and the launch of the AMR model router likely fuel continued adoption. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward agent-native design tools where the CLI and MCP become the primary interface for creative output. Developers should watch for how local-first, open-source alternatives to SaaS design tools can reduce dependency on closed platforms and enable fully offline, agent-orchestrated design pipelines. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills (+223 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Installable library of 1,541+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, and other AI coding assistants. Why it matters: With 40,559 stars, 6,545 forks, and a sustained 7-day average of 94.4 stars/day (24h delta: 150, acceleration: 1.5), this project shows strong, consistent growth. The recent release v12.4.0 and active commits within 7 days signal ongoing maintenance and feature expansion, making it a reliable choice for developers seeking structured agent skill libraries. Developer insight: The project signals a shift toward standardized, reusable agent instructions, similar to package managers for code. It may become a de facto standard for skill distribution, reducing fragmentation in the AI coding tool ecosystem. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] getagentseal/codeburn (+85 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +85，总 stars 7,971，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] kenn-io/agentsview (+589 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Local-first session intelligence and analytics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents. Also: 100x faster replacement for ccusage! Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +589，总 stars 2,368，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
